label: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 17

extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIČ attacked with BERNAL 60km out, dropped him on final climb for solo win while KUSS denied bonus seconds in three-up sprint for second.
tactical_patterns: BERNAL initiated decisive move 60km out forcing ROGLIČ isolation, revealing GC leaders unwilling to commit against long-range accelerations.
KUSS securing second place negated bonus seconds to MAS/LÓPEZ, demonstrating Jumbo's willingness to sacrifice stage podium for time gains.
Bahrain and Movistar chase efforts failed coordination despite team strength, exposing split incentives when both LÓPEZ and MAS present.
ROGLIČ sat on BERNAL wheels entire cooperation phase before attacking final climb, showing patience exploiting others' offensive work.

rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: Covered 60km BERNAL attack alone then dropped him on final climb, controlling race without team support.
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: positive: Initiated 60km solo move forcing ROGLIČ response, strongest offensive showing before caught late by chasers.
rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: positive: Contested sprint for second to deny bonus seconds to rivals, executing team tactics over personal result.
rider_signals.EIKING Odd Christian: negative: Crashed on descent losing 9+ minutes, showing vulnerability when defending jersey under sustained pressure.
rider_signals.VLASOV Aleksandr: negative: Involved in crash with EIKING, unable to feature in decisive selection on climbs.
rider_signals.LÓPEZ Miguel Ángel: neutral: Finished third in chase group sprint but gained no time advantage over direct rivals.
rider_signals.MAS Enric: neutral: Matched LÓPEZ in chase group but failed to distance other podium contenders despite team support.
rider_signals.YATES Adam: neutral: Strong finish in chase group sprint but remained passive during BERNAL/ROGLIČ move.
rider_signals.HAIG Jack: neutral: Finished with main chase group but showed no capacity to bridge to ROGLIČ.
rider_signals.CICCONE Giulio: negative: Started in chasing group but went backwards, unable to maintain pace of GC contenders.
